description: Triggers for transforming data, ideas, or presentations into compelling narratives

queries.query: Transform this data-heavy report into a compelling story for our board
Help me craft a narrative for our investor pitch that builds emotional buy-in
Turn this product update presentation into a story with a clear arc
I need to announce a pivot to my team — help me frame it as a story
Make this strategic recommendation more persuasive through storytelling
Help me build a narrative around our company's origin and mission
Transform these customer case study facts into a compelling story
Apply elite storytelling frameworks to this leadership speech
Create a story arc for our product launch announcement that builds excitement
Help me write a keynote presentation narrative for our annual company meeting
Create a product strategy canvas with strategic bets for next year
Research competitors and analyze the market landscape
Write a cover letter for this job application
Run a McKinsey structured analysis for our business problem
Design a product roadmap for our SaaS
Build an executive resume for a CEO role
Optimize this email subject line for better open rates
Help me prepare for my leadership interview
Create an ABX strategy for our enterprise sales motion
Set up a continuous discovery rhythm for our product team
